**Priority**: CRITICAL
**Category**: user_journey
**Estimated Effort**: 2 weeks
**Expected Impact**: +25% onboarding completion rate

High drop-off rate during KYC and account setup

## Proposed Solution
5-step progressive onboarding with progress indicator, skip options, and save-and-continue

- OnboardingProgress
- KYCWizard

- [ ] Works in RTL (Arabic) mode

- [ ] Dark mode compatible

# UX Proposal: Full RTL Arabic Support

**Priority**: CRITICAL
**Category**: localisation
**Estimated Effort**: 3 weeks
**Expected Impact**: +40% Arabic user retention

## Problem
Arabic UI is partially RTL — charts and tables break in Arabic mode

# UX Proposal: Improved Onboarding Flow

**Priority**: CRITICAL
**Category**: user_journey
**Estimated Effort**: 2 weeks
**Expected Impact**: +25% onboarding completion rate

## Problem
High drop-off rate during KYC and account setup

## Proposed Solution
5-step progressive onboarding with progress indicator, skip options, and save-and-continue

## Components Required
- OnboardingProgress
- KYCWizard
- RiskProfileQuiz

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Works in RTL (Arabic) mode
- [ ] Mobile-responsive (320px+)
- [ ] Accessible (WCAG AA)
- [ ] Dark mode compatible
- [ ] i18n keys added for all strings

# UX Proposal: Dark Mode Support

**Priority**: HIGH
**Category**: accessibility
**Estimated Effort**: 1 week
**Expected Impact**: +15% evening session engagement

## Problem
No dark mode — causes eye strain for night traders

## Proposed Solution
System-aware dark mode with manual toggle, persisted in user preferences

## Components Required
- ThemeProvider
- DarkModeToggle
- CSS custom properties

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Works in RTL (Arabic) mode
- [ ] Mobile-responsive (320px+)
- [ ] Accessible (WCAG AA)
- [ ] Dark mode compatible
- [ ] i18n keys added for all strings

# UX Proposal: Full RTL Arabic Support

**Priority**: CRITICAL
**Category**: localisation
**Estimated Effort**: 3 weeks
**Expected Impact**: +40% Arabic user retention

Arabic UI is partially RTL — charts and tables break in Arabic mode

Full RTL CSS with dir=rtl, RTL-aware chart labels, Arabic number formatting

- RTLProvider
- ArabicNumberFormatter

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Mobile-responsive (320px+)
- [ ] Accessible (WCAG AA)

# UX Proposal: Improved Onboarding Flow

**Priority**: CRITICAL
**Category**: user_journey
**Estimated Effort**: 2 weeks
**Expected Impact**: +25% onboarding completion rate

## Problem
High drop-off rate during KYC and account setup

## Proposed Solution
5-step progressive onboarding with progress indicator, skip options, and save-and-continue

## Components Required
- OnboardingProgress
- KYCWizard
- RiskProfileQuiz

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Works in RTL (Arabic) mode
- [ ] Mobile-responsive (320px+)
- [ ] Accessible (WCAG AA)
- [ ] Dark mode compatible
- [ ] i18n keys added for all strings

# UX Proposal: Full RTL Arabic Support

**Priority**: CRITICAL
**Category**: localisation
**Estimated Effort**: 3 weeks
**Expected Impact**: +40% Arabic user retention

Arabic UI is partially RTL — charts and tables break in Arabic mode

Full RTL CSS with dir=rtl, RTL-aware chart labels, Arabic number formatting

- RTLProvider

- [ ] Works in RTL (Arabic) mode

# UX Proposal: Improved Onboarding Flow

**Priority**: CRITICAL
**Category**: user_journey
**Estimated Effort**: 2 weeks
**Expected Impact**: +25% onboarding completion rate

## Problem
High drop-off rate during KYC and account setup

## Proposed Solution
5-step progressive onboarding with progress indicator, skip options, and save-and-continue

## Components Required
- OnboardingProgress
- KYCWizard
- RiskProfileQuiz

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Works in RTL (Arabic) mode
- [ ] Mobile-responsive (320px+)
- [ ] Accessible (WCAG AA)
- [ ] Dark mode compatible
- [ ] i18n keys added for all strings

---

# UX Proposal: Dark Mode Support

**Priority**: HIGH
**Category**: accessibility
**Estimated Effort**: 1 week
**Expected Impact**: +15% evening session engagement

## Problem
No dark mode — causes eye strain for night traders

## Proposed Solution
System-aware dark mode with manual toggle, persisted in user preferences

## Components Required
- ThemeProvider
- DarkModeToggle
- CSS custom properties

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Works in RTL (Arabic) mode
- [ ] Mobile-responsive (320px+)
- [ ] Accessible (WCAG AA)
- [ ] Dark mode compatible
- [ ] i18n keys added for all strings

# UX Proposal: Full RTL Arabic Support

**Priority**: CRITICAL
**Category**: localisation
**Estimated Effort**: 3 weeks
**Expected Impact**: +40% Arabic user retention

## Problem
Arabic UI is partially RTL — charts and tables break in Arabic mode

## Proposed Solution
Full RTL CSS with dir=rtl, RTL-aware chart labels, Arabic number formatting

## Components Required
- RTLProvider
- ArabicNumberFormatter
- RTL chart labels

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Works in RTL (Arabic) mode
- [ ] Mobile-responsive (320px+)
- [ ] Accessible (WCAG AA)
- [ ] Dark mode compatible
- [ ] i18n keys added for all strings

# UX Proposal: Global Search Upgrade

**Priority**: HIGH
**Category**: navigation
**Estimated Effort**: 1 week
**Expected Impact**: +30% symbol discovery rate

Fuzzy search with company name, ticker, ISIN lookup + recent searches

- GlobalSearch
- SearchResults
